title: Lamborghini RC Drift Car, 1:18 4WD High Speed Remote Control Drift Cars with Full Proportional Throttle and LED Light, 35 KM/H RC Racing with Speed Adjustment, Boys Toy Gifts Age 6 7 8 9 10 11 12+
features: 【Lamborghini 4WD High Speed RC Drift Car】: Lamborghini remote control drift car, 4WD, 1:18 ratio, full-proportional throttle, adjustable speed and steering, maximum speed can reach 35KM/H. A fast and high drifting skill racing car, very suitable for novice drivers and racers who want to hone their skills

【Two tires can be replaced at any time】: Drift wheels and racing wheels can be replaced at any time, and drift wheels bring a smoother drifting experience for the car. Racing wheels provide stronger grip for the car and can conquer various tracks

【Full service】: Equipped with two 7.4V rechargeable lithium batteries and charging cables, providing ultra-long battery life and more fun. 6 obstacles are used to hone drift skills. Screwdrivers and spare screws are provided, and tires can be replaced at any time to adapt to different tracks

【Carefully designed】: The body is made of high-strength ABS plastic, which improves durability, strength and aesthetics. The freely switchable lights bring a more realistic experience, allowing children to enjoy the fun of drifting remote control cars
【Gift for drift car enthusiasts】: This drift car not only brings joy to children, but also big boys will like it. It is an ideal gift for drift car enthusiasts over 6 years old
description: Product Description Lamborghini 4WD drift remote control car 2.4GHz handheld remote control Control the drift car with a joystick, full-proportional throttle provides different speeds, and 2 batteries provide more play time. Lamborghini 4WD drift car 4WD design, speed up to 35KM/H 2 types of rubber tires Drift wheels and racing wheels can be replaced at any time, bringing different experiences Accessories bring more fun Obstacle drift training, hone your skills You will receive: 1*Lamborghini 4WD drift remote control car 1*2.4GHz handheld remote control: 2 AA batteries (not included) 2*7.4V rechargeable lithium battery, 1*USB battery charging cable 4*drift rubber wheels, 4*anti-slip rubber wheels 1*anti-slip screwdriver, 1*cross screwdriver, 1*instruction manual, 6*obstacle barrels High-quality toy gifts for children over 6 years old
